$comment: Universal-skill-mounting Phase-1 golden (Codex P1-gate NB2): sha256 of every ROOT-NORMALIZED dispatched prompt + the decompose prompt for the signal-free p2-charter fixture flow. All other hashes unchanged. | REGEN 2026-07-09 #3 (Phase-2 Commit D real-canary round 1): stage1+stage2 ONLY — the REAL Stage-1 Deliver returned schema-invalid JSON (missing goal), so both Stage prompts now carry an EXPLICIT JSON output skeleton (the canary-proven contract style). research + legacy hashes unchanged. | REGEN 2026-07-09 #4 (Phase-2 real-canary round 2): bootstrap prompts ONLY — FIDELITY CONTRACTS added (round 2 proved the real decompose abstracts away byte-exact requirement content: generic bars, milestone re-grouped by file).
